commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=adcb9ec0946dffb0160fa9e5b280cf60551a1168)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Workboard CLI and slash command, changes Workboard dispatch to claim ready cards and start subagent worker runs, updates docs, and carries Copilot SDK type-alignment fixes.

PR surface: Source +687, Tests +398, Docs +325. Total +1410 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows `list`, `create`, and `show` use the local store directly while current main already exposes Workboard Gateway methods for the same operations. Live dispatch behavior was not reproduced because the PR body says no live provider-backed Gateway run was exercised.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for the protected maintainer label, worker-starting dispatch semantics, missing live proof, merge conflicts, and the remote-profile CLI targeting defect.

target.title: feat(workboard): add worker dispatch CLI
target.body:
## Summary
- Start ready Workboard cards from dispatch by claiming a bounded batch and launching Gateway subagent worker runs with persisted session/run metadata.
- Add `openclaw workboard` CLI plus `/workboard` slash command parity for list, show, create, and dispatch.
- Expand Workboard plugin docs and add a dedicated CLI reference covering SQLite state, dispatch behavior, permissions, fallback, JSON redaction, and troubleshooting.

## Verification
- `pnpm test extensions/workboard -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/workboard/src/card-lookup.ts extensions/workboard/src/cli.ts extensions/workboard/src/cli.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/command.ts extensions/workboard/src/command.test.ts extensions/workboard/src/dispatcher.ts extensions/workboard/src/dispatcher.test.ts`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm format:docs:check`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed` reached extension lint after typecheck; latest `origin/main` broad extension lint currently reports pre-existing unsafe-assertion findings outside this PR (for example qqbot/codex/line plus existing Workboard store/sqlite/tool files). Touched Workboard CLI/dispatcher files were linted directly above.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Workboard dispatch can now start bounded subagent worker lanes, and operators can inspect/create/dispatch cards from CLI or slash command surfaces.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on the rebased branch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test extensions/workboard -- --reporter=verbose`; targeted Workboard `run-oxlint`; docs list/format checks; autoreview.
Evidence after fix: Workboard extension suite passed 7 files / 94 tests, including dispatcher worker-start, slash write-scope, CLI claim-token redaction, explicit Gateway target fallback, and ambiguous prefix tests; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Ready cards are claimed and receive persisted worker run metadata; claim tokens are redacted from new CLI JSON read paths; explicit remote Gateway dispatch failures do not mutate local state.
What was not tested: A live provider-backed subagent run from a real Gateway was not exercised locally; unit tests cover the subagent runtime call and Workboard state transitions.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
